name: Extract ISDA master agreement terms and log to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
## 📈 ISDA Master Agreement Digitizer

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for ISDA documents
2. Extracts netting provisions and credit support terms
3. Pulls close-out mechanics and governing law
4. Extracts CSA terms and threshold amounts
5. Logs all terms to Google Sheets
6. Sends Slack alert with agreement summary

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for ISDA documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Counterparty | Agreement Date | Governing Law | Netting Type | Credit Support | Threshold | MTA | Close-out | Cross Default | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Derivatives trading desks
- Financial institutions
- Risk management teams

parameters.prompt: Extract ISDA Master Agreement information including: document type (ISDA 2002/ISDA 1992/CSA/Schedule/Amendment), parties (Party A and Party B names, LEIs if present), agreement date, governing law jurisdiction, netting provisions (payment netting, close-out netting), credit support document type, eligible collateral types, threshold amounts for each party, minimum transfer amount (MTA), independent amounts, valuation date and notification times, credit events and events of default, termination events, cross-default provisions and threshold, close-out amount calculation method, set-off rights, transfer provisions, early termination date mechanics, calculation agent, dispute resolution procedures, and any non-standard amendments or modifications.
